sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8240" key="a)nemo/strofos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνεμό-στροφος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n8240.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">whirling with wind,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θύελλα</foreign> prob. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-τρόπψ</foreign> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Anacreont.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">36.14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
